{{Quote|Well, here we are, Chewie-- home sweet home for a while... that is, if the locals have any employment for a couple of incognito planet-jumpers.|Han Solo|<ref name="marvel7" />}}
'''Tun Aduban''' was the largest city and only [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]].

The spaceport consisted of one control tower, manned by a broken-down [[PK-series worker droid/Legends|PK droid]]. No landing directions were given and there were no landing pads; incoming [[Starship/Legends|ships]] merely found a spot on the desert. The population of Tun Aduban was comprised mostly of drifters and unlucky [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]]. The city had little to offer beyond [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]], [[Brothel/Legends|brothels]], and merchants selling illicit goods. Places of interest included the [[House of a Higher Power]], [[Locru's Central Saloon]], and [[Spacer's Hill]].
